title: MikroTik cAPGi-5HaxD2HaxD&EG12-EA, cAP LTE12 ax
description: If you are looking for reliable wireless connectivity for busy business environments, cAP LTE12 ax is the perfect choice. This access point combines fast mobile internet, exceptional Wi-Fi 6 coverage, and a discreet design . It is an ideal solution for open-air pop-up stores, festival food stands, cozy coffee shops in the park, and other high-traffic areas With a quad-core ARM processor running at 1.8 GHz, 1 GB of RAM, and the advanced RouterOS v7 operating system, the cAP LTE12 ax offers much more than just a typical Wi-Fi device. It provides a wide range of features, including: advanced firewall rules, IPsec hardware encryption, Wireguard support, management of multiple VPN tunnels for remote connection, and even basic BGP routing capabilities. All of this makes it the ideal solution for businesses that require secure, high-performance mobile… advanced firewall rules IPsec hardware encryption Wireguard support management of multiple VPN tunnels for remote connection and even basic BGP routing capabilities Thanks to Wi-Fi 6 technology, the cAP LTE12 ax can fully utilize the potential of its high-speed CAT12 LTE modem with speeds of up to 600 Mbps . Additionally, Wi-Fi 6 offers: up to 40% higher speeds in the 5 GHz band and up to 90% higher speeds in the 2.4 GHz band, better energy efficiency, modern encryption such as OWE/WPA3-PSK/WPA3-EAP , which protects against brute-force attacks and deauthentication attempts, seamless transitions between access points with enhanced roaming up to 40% higher speeds in the 5 GHz band and up to 90% higher speeds in the 2.4 GHz band…
